final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original architectural concept illustration of a futuristic sustainable city vision (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 未来主义 architectural concept aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a wide, expansive framing that conveys aerial grandeur — exact framing and angle are yours
Subject: must include:
  - a streamlined white building floating / elevated in the air
  - drones surrounding the structure
  - holographic projections around the building
  - clean energy facilities (solar, wind, or equivalent)
Scene/backdrop: needs a futuristic city skyline backdrop conveying a 可持续城市发展 vision — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, visionary, optimistic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction anchored in white and luminous tones with accent energy colors — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, smooth, high-tech surface treatment — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: dystopian or dark atmosphere; clutter that obscures the architectural subject
